/usr/bin/ar qc libv8reader_core.a CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/v8reader_core_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/V8Unpacker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/V8Container.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/TreeReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/V8Element.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/V8Format.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/Guid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/Types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/V8File.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/V8Catalog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/metadata/TMDO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/metadata/TRequisite.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/metadata/t_comand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/metadata/t_metadata_object_with_sections.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/metadata/t_tabular.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/metadata/t_catalog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/metadata/sections/section_requisites.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/metadata/sections/section_commands.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libv8reader_core.a
